Favorites genres: Action, Comedy, Drama, Romance, Fantasy, Adventure

div.div: Ha-Buk Paeng Family’s best strength, Ji-Hyuk Paeng heads to the Nakho Region to save his family that fell into destruction due to the attack of the Demon Sect, but everything was a trap. At the moment of death, he felt the wrath of being the only one left from his beloved family. "Again…if you give me a chance…!” Paeng Ji-Hyuk, who thought he was dead, woke up in the body of Young Master Sa, of the Paeng Family.
Honja Da Hae Meongneun Cheonjae Amsalja

Waking up as the main villain of his own novel was not part of the original plan. Now a lowly level 10 assassin, Ganghu Shin must use all of his prior knowledge as the author to navigate the fantasy world he created himself, and somehow alter the ending in order to return to the real world. Can he change the outcome and defeat the “real” villain to prevent his own demise and save this world from impending doom? (Source: WEBTOONS)
